params.name: Woman at Her Toilette
params.description:
On Nov 17, 1873 AD, Morisot completed the sketch of Woman at Her Toilette.
This artwork depicts a woman at a dressing table with exquisite painting techniques. She sits elegantly before the vanity, displaying a dignified posture. Her carefully arranged hair, delicate patterns, and elaborate decorative details reflect her noble status. The painting exudes a serene and elegant atmosphere, brimming with details and depth. The play of light and shadow brings the scene to life, evoking a subtle em …
